top_5.headline: CFO Steffan Tomlinson joined from Confluent — IPO playbook in motion
top_5.evidence: Tomlinson took Palo Alto Networks and Confluent public; joined Stripe Dec 2024.
top_5.selection_reason: satisfies opening-tag constraint; specific and recent

top_5.headline: 85% of open eng roles are L5+; almost no junior pipeline
top_5.evidence: Careers filter: 47 senior/staff/principal, 8 mid, 0 junior. At Stripe's headcount, this concentrates institutional knowledge in too few people.
top_5.selection_reason: satisfies weak-tag constraint; candidate could credibly offer to help

top_5.headline: Logo wall shows F500; G2 segment skews 60% small business
top_5.evidence: Homepage lists Amazon, MSFT, Google, Salesforce. G2: 60% SMB, 28% MM, 12% ENT.
top_5.selection_reason: satisfies contradiction-tag constraint; surfaces enterprise-vs-SMB tension

top_5.headline: Bridge acquisition (Oct 2024) is the bet on stablecoin rails
top_5.evidence: Stripe acquired Bridge to own crypto-fiat conversion. Don't compete on stablecoins, route them.

top_5.headline: Engineering blog post 'Ruby at scale: 10 years of monolith pragmatism'
top_5.evidence: Stripe wrote publicly about staying on Rails + Sorbet through scale. Counter-narrative to microservices default.
top_5.selection_reason: memorable opener; rounds out the brief

cross_domain_contradictions.headline: Headcount: People says ~8000, Money says ~8500 (raw facts)
cross_domain_contradictions.evidence: Two domains' raw_facts disagree on company size. Money's source is a 2025 valuation report; People's is more recent LinkedIn-derived. Likely growth in the gap.

constraint_check.notes: All three required tags present in Top 5
